tutorials.title: From SR Latch to D Flip-Flop
tutorials.description: Build sequential logic from first principles. Start with a simple SR latch from NAND gates, add gating for level-sensitive control, then chain two gated latches to create an edge-triggered D flip-flop.

tutorials.title: Building a Microcontroller
tutorials.description: Construct an MCU from first principles — starting with an adder and ending with a program counter reading instructions from memory.
